score = 80;         // same box, new value: 80

V-10:

int year = 2026;       // no decimal point
int negative = -7;     // negative whole numbers too

score += 10;     // score = score + 10 = 90
score -= 5;      // score = score - 5 = 85
score *= 2;      // score = score * 2 = 170
H-03:

cout << "Average: " << avg;        // prints: Average: 88.5

G-04:

HE-15:
void tryChange(int x)  { x = 0; }   // copy: caller unchanged
void doChange(int &x)  { x = 0; }   // ref: caller changed
int n = 5;
tryChange(n);  // n still 5
doChange(n);   // n now 0
MW-02:
const int MAX = 100;     // compile-time constant for array size
// MAX cannot be changed later
